hero.headline: AI Software Factory
hero.tagline: Custom-built software for SMEs – SaaS cost, your own system
subs: Break free from rigid SaaS platforms.
Tailored systems deployed in 7 days with practical AI built in.
No in-house IT team needed – 24/7 operations.

preview.title: UNICOM assistant
preview.m1: Hi! What software do you need to build?
preview.m2: I need an inventory system for a 5-store retail chain.
preview.m3: Great! Tell me a bit about your current inbound and outbound process…
preview.outcome_label: Project created in the UNICOM system

items.title: Fragmented Excel management
items.body: Scattered data that's hard to consolidate and prone to manual errors.

items.title: Locked into rigid SaaS
items.body: Inflexible SaaS platforms that don't fit your business – and you don't own your data.

items.title: No in-house IT team
items.body: Insufficient resources to build and maintain your own technology systems.

items.title: AI stuck at experimental stage
items.body: Unable to integrate AI into internal software to create real business value.

items.title: Tell the AI your idea
items.body: The assistant asks what matters: your business, features, users, integrations.

items.title: Approve the brief
items.body: You get a clear project summary and confirm it before anything is sent.

items.title: Our team picks it up
items.body: The project lands directly in our management system — no request gets lost.

items.a: No. The AI survey session is completely free.
Just describe your problem in your own words — the assistant asks the rest.
Your request becomes a project in our system; the team contacts you at the details you left.

cta_section.title: Start your digital & AI transformation today
cta_section.body: Spend a few minutes describing your problem — the AI assistant asks the right questions and handles the rest.

chat.title: Consulting assistant
chat.greeting: Hi! Tell me about the software you need — I'll ask the right questions.
chat.placeholder: Describe the software you want to build…
chat.thinking: The assistant is writing a reply…
chat.wait_note: Please wait for the assistant to finish before sending the next message.
chat.agent_unavailable: The assistant is busy right now — please try again in a few minutes.
chat.start_failed: We couldn't start the conversation. Please check your connection and try again.

confirm.title: Confirm the summary and leave your contact details
confirm.name: Full name
confirm.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
confirm.failed: We couldn't submit your request — please try again.

thankyou.title: Thank you!
thankyou.body: Your request has been recorded as a project. We will contact you shortly.

disabled.title: The consultation portal is temporarily closed
disabled.body_generic: Please check back a little later.

footer.tagline: Custom software & practical AI for SME businesses

marketplace.title: Project marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Browse projects we have built. Found something close to what you need? Talk to our AI consultant.
marketplace.not_found_title: This project is no longer available
marketplace.not_found_body: It may have been unpublished. Browse the marketplace for other projects.
marketplace.prefill: I'm interested in the project "{{name}}". Please tell me more.
